headline: Pick the plan that matches how fast you want to ship.
subheadline: The live generator stays open to everyone, but paid plans unlock real customer dashboard access, stronger throughput, and the connected checkout workflow.

tiers.name: Free preview
tiers.description: Use the voice-first generator, inspect the rendered site, and confirm the offer before you upgrade.
features: Speak or type the brief directly on the homepage
Prompt-specific preview with SEO and FAQ structure
Sandboxed preview keeps live ad slots protected
Upgrade only when you need more throughput

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.description: The entry subscription for solo founders who want dashboard access and a dependable monthly build allowance.
features: Starter plan checkout via Stripe or PayPal
Saved account record tied to checkout email
Built for first launches and simple monetization

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.description: The main growth plan for operators shipping more often and needing the dashboard, previews, and checkout flow to stay fast.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: The enterprise rollout tier for teams that need stronger control, rollout support, and a governed deployment path.

faq.question: Can I still test the generator before paying?
faq.answer: Yes. The free preview flow stays live so buyers can validate the engine before they commit to a monthly plan.

faq.question: What do paid plans unlock?
faq.answer: Paid plans unlock the saved dashboard record, persistent access tied to your checkout email, and stronger monthly generation throughput.

faq.question: Do Stripe and PayPal both work from the live pricing page?
faq.answer: Yes. Each paid plan surfaces the live Stripe and PayPal links so the customer can choose the provider they trust.

faq.question: Will ads be affected when the AI generator renders previews?
faq.answer: No. The generator preview stays sandboxed and ad scripts are stripped from generated HTML so the live AdSense placements on the real site stay untouched.

cta.heading: Generate first, then subscribe when the output proves itself.
cta.body: The live site now keeps the premium generator and the paid dashboard path connected to the same pricing model so the customer flow stays consistent.
